steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: x is the additional amount Sabrina must save. She already has $180, so her total is 180 + x. 'At least $240' means total ≥ 240. The correct inequality adds 180 and x on the left, with ≥ 240 on the right.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$\frac{x}{180} \ge 240$': divides x by 180 instead of adding — no arithmetic reason for division here. ✗
  • Choice B — '$180x \ge 240$': multiplies 180 by x instead of adding — wrong operation. ✗
  • Choice C — '$180 + x \ge 240$': total savings = 180 + x, and at least $240 means ≥ 240. ✓
  • Choice D — '$180 - x \ge 240$': subtracts x, which would make her total smaller, not larger. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
